pattern_1.transformation: Convert to ISO 8601 UTC format. Parse using format '%m/%d/%y %H:%M', localize to America/Denver timezone, convert to UTC.
Rename variable. Explicit depth column in long-format data.
pattern_1.unit_conversion: Divide by 1e2 to convert from cm to m.

pattern_1.transformation: Direct column rename. 'Location' column contains site identifier 'BM' (Brush Meadow).
Look up 'Latitude (º N)' for 'Location' = site_id in BM_EGM_Well_CO2.csv. Use first row (site BM). Column name contains degree symbol; read file with encoding='latin-1'.
Look up 'Longitude (º E)' for 'Location' = site_id in BM_EGM_Well_CO2.csv. Use first row (site BM). Column name contains degree symbol; read file with encoding='latin-1'.
None; replicate information not provided in source. Populate with 1.
Rename variable. Campbell CS-655 sensor outputs VWC directly in m³/m³.
None; soil water potential not reported in source. Populate with NA.
None; gravimetric water content not reported in source. Populate with NA.

notes: Agent-generated mapping (wfsfa_sm_harmonizer v0.2, claude-sonnet-4-6, 2026-06-30). VWC time series from Campbell CS-655 sensors at Brush Meadow (BM) site, East River Watershed, Colorado (Winnick et al. 2020 JGR Biogeosciences doi:10.1029/2020JG005924). Data span June 2016 to October 2018 at multiple depths. Location coordinates from BM_EGM_Well_CO2.csv (gas well co-deployment location file). Read with encoding='latin-1' (degree symbol in column names). Temperature column (Temperature (C)) not harmonized - not in target schema.
